violations.text: Handwash sink observed in poor repair. Observed leak at plumbing.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions.PIC to remove prior to food preparation New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
